track_disclaimer: This is the BRP Calibration-Legibility & Hash-Seeded Ambient Renderer solo track. NOT Phase 241. NOT in the sequential VAPI protocol chain. Integrates downstream of Phase O0 (vapi-anchor-sentry + vapi-guardian) once that foundation is live.

hash_library.name: viem
hash_library.substitution_reason: bundle-budget — viem already provides keccak256; adding ethers would cost ~280 KB. Decision D3 from verification checkpoint. Bit-equivalence to ethers form is enforced by deriveBrpSeed.test.ts canonical-vector test.

hash_domain.purpose: domain separation between renderer-side hashes and any FROZEN-v1 protocol primitive preimage space

INV-BRP-1.reason: drafted-not-adopted — PV-CI gate at N=28 at this commit; ceremony adopts at N+5
INV-BRP-1.summary: Live-flag honesty: every BRP-namespaced React component must render data-live attribute matching its manifest entry.

INV-BRP-2.reason: drafted-not-adopted — PV-CI gate at N=28 at this commit; ceremony adopts at N+5
INV-BRP-2.summary: Verification-downstream import boundary: no module under src/brp/** may import poac/vhp/consensus/zk modules.

INV-BRP-3.reason: drafted-not-adopted — PV-CI gate at N=28 at this commit; ceremony adopts at N+5
INV-BRP-3.summary: Hash-domain isolation: every keccak256/poseidon call from BRP code must pass through deriveBrpSeed which prepends VAPI-BRP-RENDER-v1.

INV-BRP-4.reason: drafted-not-adopted — PV-CI gate at N=28 at this commit; ceremony adopts at N+5
INV-BRP-4.summary: Photosensitivity budget: flashBudget analyzer must pass — <3 Hz luminance OR |ΔL| < 0.10 OR area < 87,296 CSS px² for every animated material.

INV-BRP-5.reason: drafted-not-adopted — PV-CI gate at N=28 at this commit; ceremony adopts at N+5
INV-BRP-5.summary: Accessibility surface: every BRP canvas root must carry role=presentation aria-hidden=true with sibling DOM description; axe-core zero violations on non-canvas chrome.

live_flag_transition_rules.summary: Transition to live:true is gated on three preconditions that must all hold at the integration ceremony.
preconditions: (a) the upstream telemetry source for this surface is itself live:true in the post-O0 manifest
(b) the surface has been audited at the ceremony as honesty-first compliant
(c) PV-CI INV-BRP-1 (the live-flag invariant) has been added and is passing
